approved_by: human governance decision approving E2 bootstrap execution

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance. Installed versions may differ slightly from requested ranges (e.g., eslint 9.39.5).

modified_files: packages/config/tsconfig.base.json — changed module/moduleResolution from NodeNext to ESNext/Bundler for compatibility with extensionless workspace imports.
packages/eslint/index.js — removed non-existent @typescript-eslint/no-implicit-any rule; no-implicit-any enforced via tsconfig.
packages/eslint/package.json — added @eslint/js and typescript-eslint dependencies required by the shared flat config.
mutations.note: node_modules/ directories are install artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: xs=4, sm=8, md=16, lg=24, xl=32, xxl=48, xxxl=64
local_decisions_finalized.reason: DS-001 defines the numeric scale but not names.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Interpret DS-001 'x y blur / opacity' as pixel-based CSS shadow strings.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: DS-001 does not state units; pixels are the implied mobile unit.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Map status success/warning/error/info to the defined accent primitives.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: DS-001 references undefined aliases (Green100/300/700, Yellow, Red, Blue) for status colors.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Use existing primary.blue (#2563EB) because Blue400 is not defined in DS-001.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: DS-005 references Blue400 but the primitive is absent.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Derive from neutral palette (white surfaces, black text/borders) to maximize contrast.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: DS-005 specifies requirements only, not values.
Supports extensionless workspace imports used throughout the monorepo.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Minor corrections to E1 foundation files (tsconfig, eslint config, prettierignore) were required during E2 validation.
deviations_from_plan.justification: These are implementation fixes discovered during use, not governance changes. They preserve the E1 intent and are recorded as modified_files in this replay record.

exclusions: No business logic or domain models generated.
No Supabase config.toml or resources generated.
No changes to knowledge/ or .synth/ governance primitives.
No git commits, branches, or pushes performed.
